mapper.select: select * from study_team where id = #{teamId} and status = 1 limit 1
select * from study_team where id = #{teamId} limit 1
select * from study_team where invite_code = #{inviteCode} limit 1
select * from study_team where invite_code = #{inviteCode} and status = 1 limit 1
select * from study_team_member where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 limit 1
select * from study_team_member where team_id = #{teamId} and status = 1 order by case when role = 'owner' then 0 else 1 end, joined_time asc
select * from study_team_member where team_id = #{teamId} order by case when role = 'owner' then 0 else 1 end, status desc, joined_time asc

select st.id as team_id, st.team_name, st.invite_code, st.owner_user_id, owner.user_no as owner_user_no, owner.nickname as owner_nickname, st.status, coalesce(member_stats.member_count, 0) as member_count, st.create_time from study_team st left join app_user owner on owner.id = st.owner_user_id left join ( select team_id, count(*) as member_count from study_team_member where status = 1 group by team_id ) member_stats on member_stats.team_id = st.id where (#{keyword} is null or #{keyword} = '' or st.team_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or st.invite_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or owner.user_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or owner.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) and (#{status} is null or st.status = #{status}) order by st.status desc, st.create_time desc, st.id desc limit #{limit}
select * from study_team_invitation where id = #{invitationId} limit 1
select * from study_team_invitation where team_id = #{teamId} and invitee_user_id = #{inviteeUserId} and status = 'pending' order by create_time desc, id desc limit 1

select tm.team_id, u.id as user_id, u.user_no, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, coalesce(ups.allow_teammate_view_study, 1) as allow_teammate_view_study, coalesce(study.total_minutes, 0) as study_duration_total_minutes, coalesce(summary.total_days, 0) as check_in_days_total, coalesce(plan.completed_count, 0) as today_completed_count, coalesce(plan.total_count, 0) as today_total_count, coalesce(today_study.total_minutes, 0) as today_study_duration_minutes, case when active.id is null then 0 else 1 end as active_study_flag, coalesce(active.task_name, '') as active_task_name, case when active.id is null then '' else 'study' end as active_stage_name, coalesce(reminders.reminder_count_today, 0) as reminder_count_today from study_team_member tm inner join app_user u on u.id = tm.user_id and u.status = 1 left join user_privacy_setting ups on ups.user_id = tm.user_id left join ( select user_id, floor(coalesce(sum(duration_seconds), 0) / 60) as total_minutes from study_timer_record where status = 'finished' group by user_id ) study on study.user_id = tm.user_id left join check_in_summary summary on summary.user_id = tm.user_id left join ( select user_id, count(*) as total_count, sum(case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as completed_count from daily_plan_item dpi inner join daily_plan dp on dp.id = dpi.plan_id where dp.plan_date = #{planDate} group by user_id ) plan on plan.user_id = tm.user_id left join ( select user_id, floor(coalesce(sum(duration_seconds), 0) / 60) as total_minutes from study_timer_record where status = 'finished' and coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time) >= #{rangeStart} and coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time) < #{rangeEnd} group by user_id ) today_study on today_study.user_id = tm.user_id left join study_timer_record active on active.user_id = tm.user_id and active.status = 'active' left join ( select to_user_id, count(*) as reminder_count_today from study_team_reminder where team_id = #{teamId} and from_user_id = #{currentUserId} and create_time >= #{rangeStart} and create_time < #{rangeEnd} group by to_user_id ) reminders on reminders.to_user_id = tm.user_id where tm.team_id = #{teamId} and tm.status = 1 order by case when tm.user_id = #{currentUserId} then 0 else 1 end, case when tm.role = 'owner' then 0 else 1 end, active_study_flag desc, today_completed_count desc, today_study_duration_minutes desc, tm.joined_time asc

select tm.team_id, u.id as user_id, u.user_no, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, coalesce(ups.allow_teammate_view_study, 1) as allow_teammate_view_study, coalesce(study.total_minutes, 0) as study_duration_total_minutes, coalesce(summary.total_days, 0) as check_in_days_total, coalesce(plan.completed_count, 0) as today_completed_count, coalesce(plan.total_count, 0) as today_total_count, coalesce(today_study.total_minutes, 0) as today_study_duration_minutes, case when active.id is null then 0 else 1 end as active_study_flag, coalesce(active.task_name, '') as active_task_name, case when active.id is null then '' else 'study' end as active_stage_name, coalesce(reminders.reminder_count_today, 0) as reminder_count_today from study_team_member tm inner join app_user u on u.id = tm.user_id and u.status = 1 left join user_privacy_setting ups on ups.user_id = tm.user_id left join ( select user_id, floor(coalesce(sum(duration_seconds), 0) / 60) as total_minutes from study_timer_record where status = 'finished' group by user_id ) study on study.user_id = tm.user_id left join check_in_summary summary on summary.user_id = tm.user_id left join ( select user_id, count(*) as total_count, sum(case when status = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as completed_count from daily_plan_item dpi inner join daily_plan dp on dp.id = dpi.plan_id where dp.plan_date = #{planDate} group by user_id ) plan on plan.user_id = tm.user_id left join ( select user_id, floor(coalesce(sum(duration_seconds), 0) / 60) as total_minutes from study_timer_record where status = 'finished' and coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time) >= #{rangeStart} and coalesce(actual_end_time, create_time) < #{rangeEnd} group by user_id ) today_study on today_study.user_id = tm.user_id left join study_timer_record active on active.user_id = tm.user_id and active.status = 'active' left join ( select to_user_id, count(*) as reminder_count_today from study_team_reminder where team_id = #{teamId} and from_user_id = #{currentUserId} and create_time >= #{rangeStart} and create_time < #{rangeEnd} group by to_user_id ) reminders on reminders.to_user_id = tm.user_id where tm.team_id = #{teamId} and tm.status = 1 and tm.user_id <> #{currentUserId} order by active_study_flag desc, today_completed_count desc, today_study_duration_minutes desc, tm.joined_time asc

select m.id, m.team_id, m.sender_user_id, u.user_no as sender_user_no, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar_url as sender_avatar_url, m.content, m.masked_flag, m.deleted_flag, m.deleted_reason, m.create_time from study_team_chat_message m inner join app_user u on u.id = m.sender_user_id where m.team_id = #{teamId} and m.create_time >= #{sinceTime} order by m.id desc limit #{limit}

select m.id, m.team_id, m.sender_user_id, u.user_no as sender_user_no, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar_url as sender_avatar_url, m.content, m.masked_flag, m.deleted_flag, m.deleted_reason, m.create_time from study_team_chat_message m inner join app_user u on u.id = m.sender_user_id where m.id = #{messageId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into study_team (team_name, invite_code, owner_user_id, status) values (#{teamName}, #{inviteCode}, #{ownerUserId}, #{status})

insert into study_team_member (team_id, user_id, role, status, joined_time) values (#{teamId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{status}, current_timestamp) on duplicate key update team_id = values(team_id), role = values(role), status = values(status), joined_time = values(joined_time)
insert into study_team_invitation ( team_id, inviter_user_id, invitee_user_id, status, create_time ) values ( #{teamId}, #{inviterUserId}, #{inviteeUserId}, #{status}, #{createTime} )

insert into study_team_chat_message ( team_id, sender_user_id, content, masked_flag, deleted_flag, create_time ) values ( #{teamId}, #{senderUserId}, #{content}, #{maskedFlag}, #{deletedFlag}, #{createTime} )

insert into study_team_chat_read_state ( team_id, user_id, last_read_message_id, last_read_time ) values ( #{teamId}, #{userId}, #{lastReadMessageId}, current_timestamp ) on duplicate key update last_read_message_id = values(last_read_message_id), last_read_time = values(last_read_time)
insert into study_team_reminder (team_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, reminder_type, content, create_time) values (#{teamId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{reminderType}, #{content}, #{createTime})
